overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character exploring a foggy mountainous wilderness. The character walks along dirt paths through tall grass and rocky terrain, crosses a shallow stream near ancient stone ruins with stairs, approaches a small lit wooden structure, and continues into a misty valley with rock spires.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy hillside with tall grass and scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and wildflowers on a foggy hillside, navigating around rock outcrops

entered.detail: massive gray boulder with mossy patches rising from the grass
tall evergreen tree visible through the fog on the hillside
steep rocky cliff face partially obscured by mist
small bush with red berries close to the camera path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy wilderness area with tall grass and scattered wildflowers. Large rock outcrops and pine trees emerge from the mist as the camera follows the character along a faint trail on the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with large boulders

events.description: path curves slightly right around a large boulder formation

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path winding between large rock formations and boulders

entered.detail: massive rounded boulder beside the path with weathered surface
steep rocky incline with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a dirt trail that winds through a rockier section of the mountainside. Large boulders line the path as the terrain becomes more rugged and the vegetation thins.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream crossing with ancient stone ruins

events.description: character steps into shallow stream water, creating ripples
character exits the stream onto rocky ground near stone ruins

agents.ego_description: carefully walking through shallow water and climbing onto rocky banks near ancient stone architecture

entered.detail: shallow flowing water with visible ripples and rocky bed
ancient stone structure with weathered blocks and archways
stone staircase leading up the hillside attached to the ruins
ruined stone archway partially covered in moss

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a shallow stream and wades through the water toward ancient stone ruins. Mist rises from the water as the character approaches a stone staircase built into the hillside ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to hillside settlement with lit structure

events.description: distant warm light from wooden structure becomes visible through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking uphill toward a lit wooden structure, passing stone steps and dead trees

entered.detail: small wooden building with warm light glowing from within, built into the hillside
leafless gnarled tree trunk beside the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the stream behind, the character ascends a grassy slope toward a small lit structure on the hillside. Ancient stone stairs run parallel to the path while the warm glow of the building becomes visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty valley with rock spires and tall pines

events.description: passing the wooden structure and entering the valley beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing past the structure and descending into a wide valley with distinctive rock formations

entered.detail: tall jagged rock formation rising from the valley floor
tall evergreen tree in the valley center

segments.scene_description: The character passes the lit structure and continues into a wide misty valley. Tall rock spires and pine trees emerge from the fog as the terrain opens up into a more expansive wilderness area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty hillside that gradually transforms from a lush, floral wilderness into a rugged, rocky mountain pass. It begins by trailing a hooded character through dense fog and tall grass dotted with wildflowers, where pine trees and large rock outcrops intermittently emerge from the haze. As the character follows the faint trail, the soft vegetation begins to thin and the atmosphere shifts toward a harsher environment. The scene then opens into a more desolate landscape as the dirt path winds through a rockier section of the mountainside, with large boulders increasingly lining the way. Finally, the terrain becomes fully rugged, leaving the greenery behind in favor of a stark, stony ascent.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a damp, ruined riverbed up toward an expansive, mist-shrouded valley. It begins with the character descending to a shallow stream, wading through rising mist toward ancient stone ruins and a staircase built into the hillside. As the character leaves the water behind, the camera ascends a grassy slope where the cool fog is punctuated by the warm glow of a small lit structure. The scene then opens up as the character passes the building, shifting from the enclosed hillside into a wide valley. Finally, the terrain expands into a vast wilderness where tall rock spires and pine trees emerge from the lingering fog.
